issues.description: Condition checks HasCardOnBoard for 'Supernovas' type, but should check LeaderHasType for {Supernovas}. HasCardOnBoard is for characters on board, not leader type.
Missing condition: 'you have no other [Cavendish] Characters' — requires additional condition to check board state for absence of other Cavendish characters.
Action type is 'GiveDon' but text says 'set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active' — should be 'AttachDon' to attach/activate DON cards, not give them.
Same issues as effects[0]: LeaderHasType needed instead of HasCardOnBoard, and missing Cavendish check.
Same action type issue as effects[0]: should be 'AttachDon' not 'GiveDon'.
